scripts.dev:local: pnpm --filter @workspace/cyber-safety-hub build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server start
scripts.portal: pnpm run portal:build && pnpm run portal:start
scripts.start: cd artifacts/api-server && cross-env PORT=5000 pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm run dev:frontend" "pnpm run dev:video" "pnpm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:frontend: cd artifacts/cyber-safety-hub && cross-env PORT=3000 BASE_PATH='/' pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:video: cd artifacts/cyber-surakshit-video && cross-env PORT=3001 BASE_PATH='/video/' pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:api: cd artifacts/api-server && cross-env PORT=5000 pnpm run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
